raw_transcript: If the stones are causing this kind of pain, the standard treatment is surgery to remove the gallbladder, called a cholecystectomy. Otherwise, the stones can eventually cause an infection or even pancreatitis if they migrate into the common duct.
final_corrected_note: If the stones are causing this kind of pain, the standard treatment is surgery to remove the gallbladder, called a cholecystectomy. Otherwise, the stones can eventually cause an infection or even pancreatitis if they migrate into the common duct.
